name: Detective Montgomery Fox: The Revenge of Victor Draven
short_description: A hidden-object mystery: search locations, solve puzzles and prove your innocence! As the clock struck midnight, a valuable painting was stolen from the museum. The only problem is that the thief had no idea he actually stole it!
detailed_description:
Detective Montgomery Fox 3 — The Revenge of Victor Draven is a charming hidden object & puzzle adventure where our famous detective must clear his name.

A priceless painting has been stolen and the security footage points to Montgomery — but he insists he’s innocent. Explore dozens of hand-painted locations, solve mini-games and brain teasers, collect clues for your investigation diary, and unravel a colorful mystery perfect for all ages.

Playable solo or with kids — immerse yourself in a warm, colorful mystery and help Montgomery clear his name. Download now and start investigating!

🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Relaxed, family-friendly hidden-object gameplay — no timers, no pressure.

🗺️ Hint & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Beautifully illustrated scenes & playful soundtrack – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ Choose your difficulty level – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

  • CONTINUE the adventure and help Detective Fox with his new case

  • DOZENS of unique locations with HUNDREDS of HIDDEN ITEMS waiting to be found

  • SEARCH for clues and prove your innocence

  • INVESTIGATE the city and various locations and levels

  • MEET different characters who will help (or not?) your case

  • SOLVE mini-games and puzzles such as find the difference, jigsaw, memory and more

  • FIND items in different search modes like: random text, inverted names, silhouettes and more

  • WIN ACHIEVEMENTS and STARS on each level

  • ZOOM on scenes for easier object-finding

  • BEAUTIFUL bright and colorful graphics

  • DIFFICULTY MODES of your choice: play relaxed or challenge

  • SUITABLE for young audience

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Dutch
*languages with full audio support
